name: kenBurns
purpose: Slow Ken Burns effect — continuous, gentle zooming and drifting (for hero images/backgrounds; transform only).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-kenBurns-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-kenBurns-{{css id}} { from { transform: scale(1) translate(0, 0) } to { transform: scale({{css params.scale}}) translate(-2%, -2%) } }
